Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessTermination

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionElement
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<SourceElement>
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessTermination
All Implemented Interfaces:
IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<SourceElement>, IExecutionTermination
Enclosing class:
ExecutionNodeReader
public static class ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessTermination extends ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionNode<SourceElement> implements IExecutionTermination
An implementation of IExecutionTermination which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.

    • KeYlessTermination

      public KeYlessTermination(IExecutionNode<?> parent, String name, String formatedPathCondition, boolean pathConditionChanged, IExecutionTermination.TerminationKind terminationKind, boolean branchVerified)
      Constructor.
      Parameters:
      parent - The parent IExecutionNode.
      name - The name of this node.
      formatedPathCondition - The formated path condition.
      pathConditionChanged - Is the path condition changed compared to parent?
      exceptionalTermination - Exceptional termination?
      branchVerified - The branch verified flag.

  • Method Details

    • getExceptionVariable

      public IProgramVariable getExceptionVariable()
      Returns the IProgramVariable which is used in the Sequent of Proof.root() to check if a normal or exceptional termination occurred.
      Specified by:
      getExceptionVariable in interface IExecutionTermination
      Returns:
      The IProgramVariable which is used to caught global exceptions.

    • isBranchVerified

      public boolean isBranchVerified()
      Checks if this branch would be closed without the uninterpreted predicate and thus be treated as valid/closed in a regular proof.
      Specified by:
      isBranchVerified in interface IExecutionTermination
      Returns:
      true verified/closed, false not verified/still open
